intended_use: BriefCase is a radiological computer aided triage and notification software indicated for use in the analysis of head CTA images. The device is intended to assist hospital networks and trained radiolo
intended_use_full: BriefCase is a radiological computer aided triage and notification software indicated for use in the analysis of head CTA images. The device is intended to assist hospital networks and trained radiologists in workflow triage by flagging and communication of suspected positive findings of Large Vessel Occlusion (LVO) pathologies.
ground_truth: Independent blinded reviewer assessment of cases for presence or absence of LVO
other_metrics: Positive Likelihood Ratio: 6.9 (95% CI: 5.0-9.6); Negative Likelihood Ratio: 0.13 (95% CI: 0.1-0.2); Mean time-to-notification: 3.8 minutes (95% CI: 3.6-4.0)
